description: Recto: Letter from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to a certain Abū l-Surūr (probably an elder relative, since he is addressed as "father"). In Judaeo-Arabic. Faded and damaged, and only the upper part is preserved. Verso: Draft of a generic legal document—a "trial of style," according to Goitein. Location: Fustat. Dated: Thursday, 29 Tammuz 1536 Seleucid, which is 1225 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides. Probably written by Judge Eliyyahu b. Zekharya (AA). (Information from Goitein's index cards) EMS.
tags: Eliyyahu b. Zekharia, Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, Avraham Maimonides
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן אליהו לאבו אל-סרור, יהודית-ערבית, חלק עליון בלבד. על הגב: טיוטת שטר סגנוני, פוסטאט, 29 תמוז 1536 לשטרות = 1225, בסמכות אברהם מיימוניד.
